concepts.title: σ-algebras and measures
concepts.blurb: σ-algebras, countably additive measures, and the Borel σ-algebra generated by the open sets of R.

concepts.title: Lebesgue measure
concepts.blurb: Outer measure, Carathéodory's construction, null sets, and why Lebesgue measure extends length from intervals to Borel sets.

concepts.title: Measurable functions
concepts.blurb: f measurable iff preimages of Borel sets are measurable; simple functions approximate measurable functions from below.

concepts.title: Lebesgue integral
concepts.blurb: Integrate by partitioning the range, not the domain; agrees with Riemann when Riemann exists, but handles far more functions.

concepts.title: Monotone and dominated convergence
concepts.blurb: MCT and DCT let you swap limit and integral under mild hypotheses — the machine behind most measure-theoretic arguments.

concepts.title: Lᵖ spaces
concepts.blurb: Banach spaces of p-th-power integrable functions, Hölder and Minkowski, L² as the canonical Hilbert space of analysis.
